Appearances:
Plaintiff Kwan Cheung Der is present.
Attorney Lien Uy appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Carla D. Lopez is present.
Attorney John K. Blake, Jr. representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Aug -13-2012 is vacated.(501/JPT)
